titleStmt.title: SII 18.425: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 425. (B.K. No. 160 of 1932-33.) NARASIPUR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone lying near the temple of Narasiṁha at the village (which is now deserted).

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 14[7]8, Naḷa, Vaiśākha śu. 14, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1556, April 23. The week-day however was Thursday and not Sunday.

It states that Ellappa-Nāyaka made a gift of a village called Kurubanahaḷḷi alias Nārasiṁhapura to Toravana-Bhaṭṭa, son of Narasiṁha-Bhaṭṭa of Munavaḷḷi, belonging to Jāmadagnyavatsa-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sutra and Rik-śākhā. The donation was made for the merit of the donor's ancestors. The village was situated in Guttaḷaḷa-vēṇthe in the Baṅkapura-sīme. The donor also installed the image of god Narasiṁhadēva in the village and gave some land for the worship and offerings to that god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1478 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada vayi
śākha śu 14 Ā nārasiṁhyajayaṁti vetipātapuṁṇyakāladalū śrīma(ṁ)nma
hānāyakācāryyaru svāmidrōharagaṁḍa gaḍiyaṁkabhīma mārana cika E
llapanāyakaru taṁma tāyitaṁdegaḷiga pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu jāmadagnya
vatsagōtrada . Āśyalāyanasūtrada rukuśākheya munavaḷḷiya nā
rasiṁhabhaṭṭara makaḷutoravaṇabhaṭṭarige naṁma nāykatanake saluva
baṁkāpurada sīmevoḷagaṇa guttaḷalavēṁṭheyake saluva kuṟubanahaḷige
pratināmavāda nārasiṁhapurada grāmavanu nāu nimage dhārāpūrvaka
vāgi koṭevāgi Ā grāmadalu nārasiṁhadēvara pratiṣṭheyanumāḍi Ā dēvara
Aṁga bhōganayivēdyake koṭarāgi Adake saluva sīme muḍalu tuṁ gabha
drā teṁkalu muktanāthapurada haḷa hoṁnatiṁbaṁda haḷa sidhavaṭa
mādāpurada sīme Ārabhya paḍuvalu hoṁnatiṁda baṁda guttaḷalige hō
da dāri Ārabhya gauḍara maluparasana kaṭe Ārabhya mūḍalu hōda
haḷa Ārabhya tuṁgabhadre catusīmevoḷagāda nidhinikṣēpa jala pāśāṇa
Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidhasādhyayeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja sā(ṁ)myagaḷeṁba kaṭṭu
pālana Āgumāḍikoṁḍu sukhadalu yihadu . śrīnārasiṁha
gāmēkaṁ ratnikāmēkaṁ bhūmērapyēkamaṁgulaṁ hara
naraka mavāṁpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁ
plavaṁ ...
Digital edition of SII 18.425 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
